channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Champions League global rights deal set to be struck by U.S. agency Relevent with UEFA, clubs
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — UEFA and top European soccer clubs are set to drop the Swiss agency that has sold Champions League rights since 1992 and replace it with the U.S. firm of Miami Dolphins owner Stephen Ross.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lindsey Vonn says 'I didn’t help myself' with social media posts involving Mikaela Shiffrin
item.description: Lindsey Vonn acknowledges that “I didn’t help myself” by firing back on social media after learning that she wasn’t paired with Mikaela Shiffin for the team combined race at the skiing world championships.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dampf, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Aaliyah Edwards shocks Breanna Stewart 12-0 in opening round of Unrivaled 1-on-1 tournament
item.description: Aaliyah Edwards pulled off the stunner of the opening round of the Unrivaled 1-on-1 tournament beating top-seeded Breanna Stewart 12-0. The tournament that will be played over three days featured 23 of the league's 36 players. A few had other commitments and a couple others were out with injuries.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LaMelo Ball misses second half of Hornets' game against Brooklyn with right ankle soreness
item.description: LaMelo Ball missed the second half of Charlotte’s game against the Brooklyn Nets on Monday night because of right ankle soreness.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Virginia's high school sports governing body to comply with Trump's 'Keeping Men Out of Women’s Sports' order
item.description: The Virginia High School League announced Monday that effective immediately they will be in compliance with Trump's "Keeping Men Out of Women's Sports" order.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Simone Biles, Jane Fonda and Brittney Griner headline women’s conference in San Jose
item.description: The one-day annual event will feature keynote speeches and as well as panel discussions and other events related to issues 'connection, motivation, inspiration and skill-building' for women of all ages and at all stages of their careers.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Track's proposed eligibility, transgender rules would completely ban Semenya and others
item.description: Track and field moved toward adopting rules that would place athletes assigned female at birth but have higher testosterone levels, like Caster Semenya, under the same set of rules as transgender athletes who were born male and transitioned to female.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 2 Notre Dame women have best ranking in 6 years behind UCLA, South Carolina drops to 4th
item.description: Notre Dame moved up to No. 2 in The Associated Press women's basketball Top 25 on Monday for the Irish's best ranking since 2019. The Fighting Irish replaced South Carolina in the second spot behind UCLA after the Gamecocks lost 66-62 to Texas over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-MLB player Jacque Jones has high school jersey retired
item.description: Jacque Jones, a former Major League Baseball outfielder and San Diego native, had his legacy cemented in his alma mater's history on Saturday with the official retirement of his jersey number.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Taylor Swift booed by heavily pro-Eagles crowd at the Super Bowl
item.description: Taylor Swift was back at the Super Bowl to watch Travis Kelce and his Kansas City Chiefs play the Philadelphia Eagles on Sunday. Her reception was a whole lot different than last year.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: He's back, baby! ESPN's Dick Vitale makes return to commentating following 4th bout with cancer
item.description: ESPN’s Dick Vitale received a standing ovation Saturday night at Clemson’s Littlejohn Coliseum in his first game back as a commentator since recovering from his fourth bout with cancer.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC gives up season-high 7 goals to Carolina
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (ABC4 Sports) - After two overtime thrilling victories, the Utah Hockey Club gave up a season-high seven goals in a 7-3 loss Saturday to the Carolina Hurricanes. Seth Jarvis had two goals and two assists, and Sebastian Aho had two goals and an assist for the Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: The most expensive merch we found at the Super Bowl
item.description: We all know attending the Super Bowl is super pricey endeavor, but be prepared to shell out some serious cash if you're looking for fancy merch.
item.dc:creator: Austin Kellerman, NewsNation

item.title: Blackhawks visit the Blues after Donato's 2-goal performance
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (17-31-6, in the Central Division) vs. St. Louis Blues (24-26-5, in the Central Division) St. Louis; Saturday, 7 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Blues -250, Blackhawks +203; over/under is 5.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks visit the St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl prices are down this year. StubHub explains why
item.description: If you’re still planning to attend the Super Bowl on Sunday, you can expect a price drop compared to last year.
item.dc:creator: JOHN CARUCCI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Raiders legend Fred Biletnikoff keeps daughter's dream alive
item.description: LOOMIS, Calif. - Fred Biletnikoff still goes to a lot of Raiders games. "Sometimes I don't know why," laughed the Hall of Fame wideout. "It's just the history." Fred has a lot of history with the Raiders.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe make the Pro Football Hall of Fame
item.description: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe were voted into the Pro Football Hall of Fame in the smallest induction class in 20 years following offseason rule changes meant to make it harder to get inducted.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NCAA changes transgender policy to limit women's competition to athletes assigned female at birth
item.description: The NCAA changed its participation policy for transgender athletes on Thursday, limiting competition in women's sports to athletes assigned female at birth only.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jason Kelce and look-alike posse take on New Orleans
item.description: Five of the most passionate NFL fan duos in America were challenged to be the first team to find the real Jason Kelce.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Bevan Brothers Commit to Colorado Mesa
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Two brothers from Plateau Valley High School are taking the next step in their athletic careers, and they won’t have to go far to do it. Jackson and Heston Bevan, both standout multi-sport athletes, are staying close to home.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Settlement creates $5 million fund for NWSL players after abuse scandal
item.description: The National Women's Soccer League will establish a $5 million fund for players as part of a settlement that stemmed from allegations of emotional and sexual misconduct that rocked the league in 2021. Attorneys general from Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers legend Steve Young believes football was made for girls
item.description: ATHERTON, Calif. - Steve Young is fully invested in one of Silicon Valley's newest startups - girls flag football. Whether it's the size of the field. "The front line you don't see. You see the cone here? Every first down is a cone." The size of the ball.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9
